meaning: adj.多言的,冗长的,废话连篇,唠叨的
examples: The chapter is mostly wordy rhetoric.
Awkward or wordy phrasing or unclear sentences and paragraphs should be mercilessly poked and prodded into shape.
Instead of wordy, worthy strategies, future governments need to do more to provide the conditions for sport to thrive.
Angeline Evans is an avid consumer and creator of all things wordy and written.
There were twenty other bidders for the contract, most of whom used bulleted, wordy PowerPoint slides.
